purpose: Define the verified intermediate model shared by 3.0 flows, 4.0 wireframes, right-side notes, and renderer payloads. Contracts define structure, never project-specific feature names.

rules.semanticBeforeRendering: Build and validate this model before any Figma rendering.
rules.singleModelProjection: 3.0 flow nodes, 4.0 wireframes, and right-side notes must reference the same interface, state, and element ids.
rules.llmOwnsSemantics: The model guides LLM design decisions; it must not force renderer-owned generic layouts to replace player-flow or interface-design judgment.
rules.contentFirst: Renderer transport limits must never cause loss of interface rows, wireframe controls/states/feedback, notes, or AI pending content.
rules.versionHistoryPreserved: overview.versionHistory[] is the preferred version record format. First generation may contain one row; later iterations append rows rather than overwrite history.
rules.noTemplatePathSemantics: Template sample layout or connector order must never create player-flow semantics.
rules.evidenceRequired: Flow edges and notes must carry source evidence or an explicit inferred-gap basis.
rules.utf8Required: Artifacts must be UTF-8 without BOM and LF. Damaged text such as replacement characters, question-mark blocks, or mojibake must fail.
